{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Weather Authority
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Weather Authority]] predicted no rain.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4">''The Captain'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Weather Authority]] is a group whose spells control the weather.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
